tip: W yourself before R — combo for max burst. Ask Lulu to W you on engage.
Let Thresh hook first, then unstealth and follow up with spray.
You have healing — play aggressive, she covers you. Stealth when she ults.
Combo: Blitz hooks, unstealth from Q and spray immediately after.
Hard engage support — unstealth the moment Nautilus hooks, burst the hooked target.
Leona hard engage — stay in stealth until she lands E or Q, then come out.
Yuumi attaches and heals you during stealth engage — play very aggressively.
Janna shields you and knocks up — her ult repositions you for a clean spray angle.
Nami bubble into your R is a strong combo — coordinate timings.
Karma RQ poke enables you to follow up with stealth dive — good kill setup.
Lux binds → you unstealth and spray. Stay back if Lux misses root.
Long-range poke support — you stealth dive while enemies are poked low.
Brand can burst from range — stealth to flank while enemies focus Brand.
Zyra roots and slows — unstealth after she lands snare for easy kill.
Senna heals and slows — long range synergy. She can root from far for your dive.
Morgana binds for 3s — that's your entire stealth engage. Combo reliably.
Alistar headbutts into Q — be ready to unstealth the moment he engages.
Rakan engages in a circle — stay at edge of fight in stealth, come out on second charm.
Seraphine can chain-CC with ult — stealth in behind their backline while they're stunned.
Pyke hooks and execute-ults — stealth dive together for easy double kills.
Bard ult freezes everyone — only come out of stealth AFTER it ends, then spray.
Sona ult AoE stun — dive in stealth before she ults for maximum burst.
